TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: balidas (Hulam a sulit: ŚĪĪś£ē) alangawan nida/sakauzip a mulangaway : madihinay nu kilang a walu a lasubu a lidek nu buyu'. saka cacay a sapihicahi:ca : kapah satangsuyan atu sasaasik atu sapacengceng sapibuting ku banuh. saka tusa a sapihicahi:ca : mangaduway a liuc sapisanga' tu saasik. saka tulu a sapihicahi:ca : asu' ka'nen tu dungec nu balidas.
S.PHON: bar~…ĺidas (ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit: **) ar~…ĺaŇčawan nida/sakauzip a mur~…ĺaŇčawaj : madińßinaj nu kir~…ĺaŇč a war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu a r~…ĺid…ôk nu buju Ē~ °. saka ¶a ¶aj a sapińßi ¶ańßi: ¶a : kapańß sataŇčsujan atu sasaasik atu sapa ¶…ôŇč ¶…ôŇč sapibutiŇč ku banuńß. saka tusa a sapińßi ¶ańßi: ¶a : maŇčaduwaj a r~…ĺiu ¶ sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu saasik. saka tur~…ĺu a sapińßi ¶ańßi: ¶a : asu Ē~ ° ka Ē~ °n…ôn tu duŇč…ô ¶ nu bar~…ĺidas.
S.FORM: balidas (Hulam a sulit: ŚĪĪś£ē) alangawan nida/sakauzip a mulangaway : madihinay nu kilang a walu a lasubu a lidek nu buyu'. saka cacay a sapihicahi:ca : kapah satangsuyan atu sasaasik atu sapacengceng sapibuting ku banuh. saka tusa a sapihicahi:ca : mangaduway a liuc sapisanga' tu saasik. saka tulu a sapihicahi:ca : asu' ka'nen tu dungec nu balidas.
S.PHON: bar~…ĺidas (ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit: **) ar~…ĺaŇčawan nida/sakauzip a mur~…ĺaŇčawaj : madińßinaj nu kir~…ĺaŇč a war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu a r~…ĺid…ôk nu buju Ē~ °. saka ¶a ¶aj a sapińßi ¶ańßi: ¶a : kapańß sataŇčsujan atu sasaasik atu sapa ¶…ôŇč ¶…ôŇč sapibutiŇč ku banuńß. saka tusa a sapińßi ¶ańßi: ¶a : maŇčaduwaj a r~…ĺiu ¶ sapisaŇča Ē~ ° tu saasik. saka tur~…ĺu a sapińßi ¶ańßi: ¶a : asu Ē~ ° ka Ē~ °n…ôn tu duŇč…ô ¶ nu bar~…ĺidas.
